name: China Sandi Holdings Limited
summary: China Sandi Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment and development of properties in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in Property Development, Property Investment, and Hotel Operation segments. It is also involved in the leasing of investment properties and providing property management services. In addition, the company provides hotel accommodation and catering services. Further, it engages in the securities trading. It owns and leases shopping malls, hotels, office units, commercial units, kindergartens, and car parking facilities. The Company was formerly known as China Grand Forestry Green Resources Group Limited and changed its name to China Sandi Holdings Limited in October 2012. China Sandi Holdings Limited is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
